context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual-layer discovery feature complete. Key implementation: (1) MarketDataFeed has _load_broad_markets (500 markets, 60s) and _load_crypto_markets (3000 events, 30s). (2) CRYPTO_SLUG_PREFIXES filters for crypto updown markets. (3) Expired markets filtered by end_date. (4) crypto_markets_discovered=0 is CORRECT because all 57 updown markets on Polymarket are expired. (5) New endpoint GET /api/health/discovery returns discovery_stats. (6) Discovery stats injected into /api/status at stats.health.discovery. Engine must be started before testing: POST /api/engine/start.
